[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010010 2
1 1011111 6
2 0101010 3
3 1111110 6
4 1010001 3
5 1111001 5
6 1101111 6
7 0101110 4

12 0000000 a
23 0101110 4 match 7
34 1000000 1
45 0000000 a
56 1100001 3
67 0001000 1
70 0000100 1
